'''chafuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumococcosis|pneumococcosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumococcosis|pneumococcosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chafuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæfichith|chæfichith]] || [[word:chæfichij|chæfichij]] || [[word:chæfichish|chæfichish]] || [[word:chæfichi|chæfichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chafufuchuth|chafufuchuth]] || [[word:chafufuchuj|chafufuchuj]] || [[word:chafufuchush|chafufuchush]] || [[word:chafufuchu|chafufuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chafuchuth|chafuchuth]] || [[word:chafuchuj|chafuchuj]] || [[word:chafuchush|chafuchush]] || [[word:chafuchu|chafuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chafufchuth|chafufchuth]] || [[word:chafufchuj|chafufchuj]] || [[word:chafufchush|chafufchush]] || [[word:chafufchuf|chafufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chafuchuthu|chafuchuthu]] || [[word:chafuchuju|chafuchuju]] || [[word:chafuchushu|chafuchushu]] || [[word:chafuchuku|chafuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chafuchuth|chafuchuth]] || [[word:chafuchuj|chafuchuj]] || [[word:chafuchush|chafuchush]] || [[word:chafuchu|chafuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chafuchuthul|chafuchuthul]] || [[word:chafuchujul|chafuchujul]] || [[word:chafuchushul|chafuchushul]] || [[word:chafuchukul|chafuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chafuchuthuthu|chafuchuthuthu]] || [[word:chafuchujuju|chafuchujuju]] || [[word:chafuchushushu|chafuchushushu]] || [[word:chafuchuku|chafuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chafuchuthun|chafuchuthun]] || [[word:chafuchujun|chafuchujun]] || [[word:chafuchushun|chafuchushun]] || [[word:chafuchukun|chafuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chafuchuthuoro|chafuchuthuoro]] || [[word:chafuchujuoro|chafuchujuoro]] || [[word:chafuchushuoro|chafuchushuoro]] || [[word:chafuchukuoro|chafuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
